category_sources: source_facts.description says Style and grammar checker; official LanguageTool development page describes grammar, style, and spelling checking.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage is languagetool.org; official development page uses the LanguageTool name.
docs_sources: Official languagetool.org development page links to complete development documentation and HTTP API documentation.
